# Notification settings (demo)

## What you'll learn

How to tune which notifications Jamble sends you, under **Settings** > **Notifications**.

![Notification settings screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Jamble-Live-Shopping/help-center/main/assets/mockups/notification-settings-demo__settings__en__v3.png)

## Categories

- **Live shows** alerts when a show goes live.
- **Bookmarked products** alerts about products you saved.
- **Messages** alerts when sellers reply.
